case_title: LUKASZ PASEK VS. FPI MANAGEMENT, INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PASEK, LUKASZ AS TO DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PASEK, LUKASZ
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PASEK, LUKASZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2023 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-29-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO HEARING HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S PERMISSION TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM IS EXTENDED TO THE NEW COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. KANE (D. 506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2023 - PLAINTIFF LUKASZ PASEK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT FPI MANAGEMENT, INC. WAS NOT PRESENT. CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TIME TO AMEND THE CLAIM TO LIST THE CORRECT DEFENDANT TO MAR-01-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S ORDER GRANTING A ZOOM APPEARANCE IS CONTINUED TO THE NEXT DATE.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LUKASZ PASEK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FPI MANAGMENT, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
